personas.name: Rob Castellano
personas.title: CEO
personas.summary: Conservative community bank CEO who grew his Alabama bank from $800M to $7.2B through careful, peer-validated decisions.
personas.keyPain: Fiserv contract renewal anxiety with board pressure for digital innovation
messagingWorks: We work with 40 community banks your size across the Southeast
Here's what First National in Jackson said about their experience
This integrates natively with Fiserv Premier. No middleware required
messagingFails: AI-powered anything without specific use cases
personas.decisionAuthority: Up to $2M direct, Board approval above
personas.layer1: Started as commercial loan officer at 24. Alabama banking career. Grew bank through organic growth and acquisitions.
personas.layer2: State-chartered community bank, $7.2B assets, 47 branches, Birmingham metro coverage
personas.layer3: President and CEO, 10 years in role. Signs all tech contracts over $500K.
personas.layer4: Fiserv Premier on-prem, NCR Digital Insight, minimal cloud, low API readiness
personas.layer5: Conservative risk tolerance, trusts peer references over features, gut decisions with CFO data
personas.layer6: Deposit competition, core renewal pressure, talent loss to fintechs
personas.layer7: Active trigger: Fiserv renewal + board pressure. 9-15 month cycles. $8.5M budget.
personas.layer8: Regional credibility, peer references, integration confidence vs disruption language
